NAVAREA XIX 49/21
 BARENTS SEA
 1. CABLE SHIP ILE DE BATZ WILL START CABLE OPERATIONS ALONG THE FOLLOWING ROUTE. OPERATION WILL START 080600 UTC MAY 21 AND EXPECTED TO BE COMPLETED 282359 JUN 21.

 CS ILE DE BATZ WILL OPERATE ALONG THE FOLLOWING POSITION:
  
 72-28.2N 020-14.5E
 72-26.1N 020-30.5E
 72-14.6N 021-06.1E
 71-06.4N 023-44.8E
 71-01.8N 023-45.8E
 70-53.3N 023-28.5E
 70-46.5N 023-40.1E
 70-42.7N 023-30.8E
 70-41.0N 023-35.5E
  
 2. VESSEL IN VICINITY REQUESTED TO KEEP A SHARP LOOK OUT AND A WIDE BERTH. RAM SHAPES AND LIGHTS WILL BE DISPLAYED. SECURITE MESSAGE WILL BE BRODCASTED ON VHF CH 16.
